zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne於大約0960年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Rodolphe de Torta27歲，母親Herfast De Crepon Arque22歲。她去世於1022年11月4日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利享年63歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne于大约0960年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Rodolphe de Torta27岁，母亲Herfast De Crepon Arque22岁。她去世于1022年11月4日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利享年63岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Torta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Roberto, Jesus, Manuel, Miguel, Armando, Arturo, Orlando, Pablo, Ricardo.
Catalan and Portuguese: from horta ‘garden’ (from Latin hortus), hence a topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosed garden or a metonymic occupational name for a gardener.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne was born about 0960, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Rodolphe de Torta, was 27 and her mother, Herfast De Crepon Arque, was 22. She died on 4 November 1022, in Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne est née environ 0960, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Rodolphe de Torta, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Herfast De Crepon Arque, avait 22 ans. Elle est décédée le 4 novembre 1022, à Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne um 0960 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rodolphe de Torta 27 und ihre Mutter Herfast De Crepon Arque 22. Sie starb am 4. November 1022 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne è nata il circa 0960 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Rodolphe de Torta, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Herfast De Crepon Arque, aveva 22 anni. Morì il 4 novembre 1022, nel Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenneが約0960年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Rodolphe de Tortaは27歳，母Herfast De Crepon Arqueは22歳であった。彼女は1022年11月4日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメで63歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne(이)가 대략 0960년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rodolphe de Torta(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Herfast De Crepon Arque(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1022년 11월 4일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne nasceu aproximadamente 0960, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Rodolphe de Torta, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Herfast De Crepon Arque, tinha 22 anos. Ela faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1022, em Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne родилась около 0960 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Rodolphe de Torta было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Herfast De Crepon Arque, 22. Она умерла 4 ноября 1022 г. в местности сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Torta comtesse de Varenne nació aproximadamente 0960, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Rodolphe de Torta, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Herfast De Crepon Arque, tenía 22 años. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1022, en Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Francia.
